articles.author: Allison DeAngelis
articles.title: Eli Lilly’s $3.25 billion acquisition of Kelonia Therapeutics caps startup’s tortuous ride - statnews.com
articles.description: Kelonia Therapeutics, a small biotech company, long struggled to stay afloat. Now it's been acquired by Eli Lilly for $3.25 billion.
articles.content:
Eli Lilly is spending $3.25 billion to acquire Kelonia Therapeutics, a small biotech company developing cell therapies for cancer and autoimmune diseases, the companies announced Monday.

articles.title: Apple names new chief executive to replace Tim Cook - BBC
articles.description: John Ternus will take over running the technology giant as Cook steps up to become executive chairman.

articles.title: Absurd study suggests eating fruits and vegetables leads to cancer - Ars Technica
articles.description: Experts point out a series of flaws, including small size and no control group.

articles.author: Ryan Whitwam
articles.title: Deezer says 44% of new music uploads are AI-generated, most streams are fraudulent - Ars Technica
articles.description: AI tracks account for a small fraction of Deezer streams, and most are demonetized for fraud.
